mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_profile_radar_pending_changes ( session_id, student_id, biz_domain, last_profile_result_id, pending_changed_fields_json, pending_affected_dimensions_json, last_change_source, last_change_remark, version_no, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{studentId}, #{bizDomain}, #{lastProfileResultId}, #{pendingChangedFieldsJson}, #{pendingAffectedDimensionsJson}, #{lastChangeSource}, #{lastChangeRemark}, #{versionNo}, #{now}, #{now}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_profile_radar_pending_changes SET student_id = #{studentId}, biz_domain = #{bizDomain}, last_profile_result_id = #{lastProfileResultId}, pending_changed_fields_json = #{pendingChangedFieldsJson}, pending_affected_dimensions_json = #{pendingAffectedDimensionsJson}, last_change_source = #{lastChangeSource}, last_change_remark = #{lastChangeRemark}, version_no = #{versionNo}, update_time = #{now} WHERE pending_id = #{pendingId}
mapper.select: SELECT pending_id, last_profile_result_id, pending_changed_fields_json, pending_affected_dimensions_json, version_no FROM ai_profile_radar_pending_changes WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT table_name, field_name, affects_radar, affected_dimensions_json FROM ai_profile_radar_field_impact_rules WHERE biz_domain = #{bizDomain} AND status = 'active' AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
